alerts.name: Large Chapter 11
alerts.trigger: Any new Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing with over $500M in liabilities

alerts.name: Insider selling
alerts.trigger: Any Form 4 showing insider selling over $1M in watchlist names

alerts.name: HY spread blowout
alerts.trigger: HY OAS widens more than 25bps in a single day

alerts.name: Fed surprise
alerts.trigger: Any unexpected Fed action or emergency meeting

alerts.name: Distressed exchange
alerts.trigger: Any distressed exchange, liability management exercise, or cooperation agreement mentioned

alerts.name: Rating downgrade
alerts.trigger: Any downgrade of a watchlist company or any downgrade to junk/speculative grade (fallen angel)
